common.siteDescription: Bilingual study platform for IAAP CPACC & WAS certifications

hero.title: Prepare for IAAP Certifications
hero.subtitle: Bilingual Korean-English study platform for CPACC & WAS exams

bilingual.title: Bilingual Study Cards
bilingual.description: Korean explanation paired with English original text

cpacc.title: CPACC Exam Prep
cpacc.overview: Certified Professional in Accessibility Core Competencies

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A11yCert is a bilingual study platform for Korean learners preparing for IAAP CPACC and WAS certifications.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: Korean-language resources for IAAP accessibility certifications are scarce. A11yCert was created to bridge that gap — offering bilingual (Korean/English) study cards, flashcards, and practice quizzes so learners can prepare effectively for English-language exams.

creator.title: Creator
creator.name: Isaac
creator.intro: A developer passionate about web development and digital accessibility. This site was built while preparing for the CPACC exam, out of a need for quality Korean-language study materials.

source.title: Content Source
source.body: All study content is based on the official IAAP Body of Knowledge (BoK). Please refer to official IAAP materials alongside this site when preparing for your exam.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: This site is not affiliated with or endorsed by IAAP. It provides unofficial study materials. While we strive for accuracy, content may differ from actual exam questions. Please report errors via email at contact@a11ycert.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: a11ycert.com values your privacy. This policy explains what information is collected and how it is used.

collected.title: Information We Collect
collected.body: This site does not require registration or login. Study progress and wrong-answer notes are stored only in your browser's localStorage and are never sent to a server or shared externally.

thirdParty.title: Advertising & Analytics
thirdParty.adsense: Google AdSense: Uses cookies to display personalized ads based on your interests.
thirdParty.analytics: Google Analytics: Collects anonymized visit statistics. No personally identifiable information is collected.
thirdParty.moreInfo: For more details, please refer to Google's Privacy Policy.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.body: This site uses third-party cookies for advertising and analytics. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, which may limit certain features.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You can delete all data stored by this site at any time by clearing your browser's localStorage.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related inquiries, please email contact@a11ycert.com.

cert.unitQuizHint: {count} questions · Wrong answers are saved automatically

mockExam.title: Mock Exam
mockExam.introDesc: Practice under real exam conditions. Questions and order are randomized each time, and answers are hidden until you submit.
mockExam.domainWeights: Domain mix: proportional to real exam weights
mockExam.notEnoughQuestions: No questions available. Complete a study unit first.
mockExam.timeUp: Time is up — your exam was submitted
mockExam.question: Question {current} / {total}
mockExam.confirmSubmit: You have {count} unanswered questions. Submit anyway?

stats.title: Progress & Stats
stats.description: Review your quiz and mock exam history with per-domain accuracy.
stats.noAttempts: No attempts yet. Try a mock quiz or mock exam.
stats.localOnly: Not signed in — history is stored only in this browser.

flashcardsSrs.noDue: No cards due today. Browse all to learn new cards.
